text.NRSV: Only Jonathan son of Asahel and Jahzeiah son of Tikvah opposed this, and Meshullam and Shabbethai the Levites supported them.
text.Rotherham: Only Jonathan son of Asahel and Jahzeiah son of Tikvah, made a stand against this,—and, Meshullam and Shabbethai the Levite, helped them.

text.NRSV: Then the returned exiles did so. Ezra the priest selected men, heads of families, according to their families, each of them designated by name. On the first day of the tenth month they sat down to examine the matter.
text.Rotherham: But the Sons of the Exile, did thus, and Ezra the priest separated to himself certain men—ancestral heads by their ancestral houses, and all of them by name,—and they took their seats on the first day of the tenth month to search into the matter;

text.NRSV: By the first day of the first month they had come to the end of all the men who had married foreign women.
text.Rotherham: and they made an end with all the men who had married foreign women,—by the first day of the first month.

text.NRSV: There were found of the descendants of the priests who had married foreign women, of the descendants of Jeshua son of Jozadak and his brothers: Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib, and Gedaliah.
text.Rotherham: Now there were found, of the sons of the priests, who had married foreign women,—of the sons of Jeshua son of Jozadak, and his brethren, Maaseiah, and Eliezer, and Jarib, and Gedaliah;

text.NRSV: They pledged themselves to send away their wives, and their guilt offering was a ram of the flock for their guilt.
text.Rotherham: and they gave their hand, that they would put away their wives,—and, being guilty, [they offered] a ram of the flock for their guilt.

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Immer: Hanani and Zebadiah.
text.Rotherham: And, of the sons of Immer, Hanani, and Zebadiah.

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Harim: Maaseiah, Elijah, Shemaiah, Jehiel, and Uzziah.
text.Rotherham: And, of the sons of Harim, Maaseiah and Elijah and Shemaiah, and Jehiel, and Uzziah.

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Pashhur: Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethanel, Jozabad, and Elasah.
text.Rotherham: And, of the sons of Passhur, Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethanel, Jozabad, and Elasar.

text.NRSV: Of the Levites: Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah (that is, Kelita), Pethahiah, Judah, and Eliezer.
text.Rotherham: And, of the Levites, Jozabad and Shimei, and Kelaiah, the same, is Kelita, Pethahiah, Judah, and Eliezer.

text.NRSV: Of the singers: Eliashib. Of the gatekeepers: Shallum, Telem, and Uri.
text.Rotherham: And, of the singers, Eliashib. And, of the doorkeepers, Shallum and Telem and Uri.

text.NRSV: And of Israel: of the descendants of Parosh: Ramiah, Izziah, Malchijah, Mijamin, Eleazar, Hashabiah, and Benaiah.
text.Rotherham: And, of Israel, of the sons of Parosh, Ramiah and Izziah and Malchijah and Mijamin and Eleazar, and Malchijah, and Benaiah.

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Elam: Mattaniah, Zechariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth, and Elijah.
text.Rotherham: And, of the sons of Elam, Mattaniah, Zechariah, and Jehiel and Abdi, and Jeremoth, and Elijah.

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Zattu: Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, Jeremoth, Zabad, and Aziza.
text.Rotherham: And, of the sons of Zattu, Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah and Jeremoth, and Zabad, and Aziza.

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Bebai: Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, and Athlai.
text.Rotherham: And, of the sons of Bebai, Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, Athlai.

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Bani: Meshullam, Malluch, Adaiah, Jashub, Sheal, and Jeremoth.
text.Rotherham: And, of the sons of Bani, Meshullam, Malluch, and Adaiah, Jashub, and Sheal, Jeremoth.

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Pahath-moab: Adna, Chelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezalel, Binnui, and Manasseh.
text.Rotherham: And, of the sons of Pahath-moab, Adna and Chelal,—Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezalel, and Binnui, and Manasseh.

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Harim: Eliezer, Isshijah, Malchijah, Shemaiah, Shimeon,
text.Rotherham: And, [of] the sons of Harim, Eliezer, Isshijah, Malchijah, Shemaiah, Shimeon;

text.NRSV: Benjamin, Malluch, and Shemariah.
text.Rotherham: Benjamin, Malluch, Shemariah.

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Hashum: Mattenai, Mattattah, Zabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manasseh, and Shimei.
text.Rotherham: Of the sons of Hashum, Mattenai, Mattattah, Zabad, Eliphelet,—Jeremai, Manasseh, Shimei.

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Bani: Maadai, Amram, Uel,
text.Rotherham: Of the sons of Bani, Maadai, Amram, and Uel;

text.NRSV: Benaiah, Bedeiah, Cheluhi,
text.Rotherham: Benaiah, Bedeiah, Cheluhu;

text.NRSV: Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib,
text.Rotherham: Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib;

text.NRSV: Mattaniah, Mattenai, and Jaasu.
text.Rotherham: Mettaniah, Mattenai, and Jaasu;

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Binnui: Shimei,
text.Rotherham: and Bani, and Binnui, Shimei;

text.NRSV: Shelemiah, Nathan, Adaiah,
text.Rotherham: and Shelemiah, and Nathan, and Adaiah;

text.NRSV: Machnadebai, Shashai, Sharai,
text.Rotherham: Machnadebai, Shashai, Sharai;

text.NRSV: Azarel, Shelemiah, Shemariah,
text.Rotherham: Azarel, and Shelemiah, Shemariah;

text.NRSV: Shallum, Amariah, and Joseph.
text.Rotherham: Shallum, Amariah, Joseph.

text.NRSV: Of the descendants of Nebo: Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel, and Benaiah.
text.Rotherham: Of the sons of Nebo, Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina,—Iddo, and Joel, Benaiah.

text.NRSV: All these had married foreign women, and they sent them away with their children.
text.Rotherham: All these, had taken foreign women,—and had begotten of them children.
